creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Created attachment 201941
patch for port

This updates net/foreman-proxy to version 1.20.1.

Furthermore I've removed PUPPET4 (which is EOL and the port is already scheduled for removal) in favour of PUPPET6.

RELEASE NOTES:
https://theforeman.org/manuals/1.16/index.html#Releasenotesfor1.16
https://theforeman.org/manuals/1.17/index.html#Releasenotesfor1.17
https://theforeman.org/manuals/1.18/index.html#Releasenotesfor1.18
https://theforeman.org/manuals/1.19/index.html#Releasenotesfor1.19
https://theforeman.org/manuals/1.20/index.html#Releasenotesfor1.20
